mapper.sql: aed.id, aed.employee_id, aed.exception_type, aed.exception_date, aed.exception_describes, aed.dispose_employee_id, aed.dispose_date, aed.dispose_result, aed.dispose_flag, aed.req_code, aed.attribute1, aed.attribute2, aed.attribute3, aed.enabled_flag, aed.create_by, aed.create_time, aed.update_by, aed.update_time

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.exception_type as ${tAlias}_exception_type, ${tAlias}.exception_date as ${tAlias}_exception_date, ${tAlias}.exception_describes as ${tAlias}_exception_describes, ${tAlias}.dispose_employee_id as ${tAlias}_dispose_employee_id, ${tAlias}.dispose_date as ${tAlias}_dispose_date, ${tAlias}.dispose_result as ${tAlias}_dispose_result, ${tAlias}.dispose_flag as ${tAlias}_dispose_flag, ${tAlias}.req_code as ${tAlias}_req_code, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time

select
from ac_exception_dispose aed, pm_employee pe where aed.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into ac_exception_dispose (employee_id, exception_type, exception_date, exception_describes, dispose_employee_id, dispose_date, dispose_result, dispose_flag, req_code, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{exceptionType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exceptionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{exceptionDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{disposeEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{disposeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{disposeResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{disposeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{reqCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update ac_exception_dispose set employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, exception_type = #{exceptionType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exception_date = #{exceptionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, exception_describes = #{exceptionDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dispose_employee_id = #{disposeEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dispose_date = #{disposeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, dispose_result = #{disposeResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dispose_flag = #{disposeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, req_code = #{reqCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
